name: Batch Chemical Inventory Entry for Water Treatment Facility
description:
You are an environmental engineer at a municipal water treatment plant filing the annual EPCRA Section 312 Tier II report. Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. First, add a new facility named 'Greenfield Municipal Water Treatment Plant' (you can use placeholder data for its address, but the facility name must match). Then, navigate to the Chemicals section and add the following three chemicals to this facility's inventory:

1. Chlorine (CAS: 7782-50-5): Mark as EHS. Hazards: Gas under pressure, Oxidizer, Acute toxicity, Serious eye damage. Quantities: Max code 05, Ave code 04, 365 days on-site. Storage: Cylinder, Ambient temp, Above ambient pressure.
2. Sulfuric Acid (CAS: 7664-93-9): Mark as EHS. Hazards: Corrosive to metals, Acute toxicity, Skin corrosion, Serious eye damage. Quantities: Max code 06, Ave code 05, 365 days on-site. Storage: Tank (above ground), Ambient temp, Ambient pressure.
3. Sodium Hypochlorite (CAS: 7681-52-9): Do NOT mark as EHS. Hazards: Oxidizer, Corrosive to metals, Acute toxicity, Skin corrosion, Serious eye damage. Quantities: Max code 05, Ave code 04, 365 days on-site. Storage: Tank (above ground), Ambient temp, Ambient pressure.

After entering all three chemicals, save your work and export the submission file to: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\batch_chemicals.t2s
